sections.paragraph:
Jericho H3405
1. A city east of Jerusalem and near the Jordan
- General references
Num 22:1; Num 26:3; Deu 34:1
- Called the City of Palm Trees
Deu 34:3
- Situation of, pleasant
2Ki 2:19
- Rahab the harlot lived in
Jos 2; Heb 11:31
- Joshua sees the »captain of the host« of the Lord near
Jos 5:15
- Besieged by Joshua seven days; fall and destruction of
Jos 6; Jos 24:11
- Situated within the territory allotted to Benjamin
Jos 18:12; Jos 18:21
- The Kenites dwelt at
Jdg 1:16
- King of Moab makes conquest of, and establishes his capital at
Jdg 3:13
- Rebuilt by Hiel
1Ki 16:34
- Company of »the sons of the prophets,« dwelt at
2Ki 2:5; 2Ki 2:15; 2Ki 2:18
- Captives of Judah, taken by the king of Israel, released at, on account of the denunciation of the prophet Oded
2Ch 28:15
- Inhabitants of, taken captive to Babylon, return to, with Ezra and Nehemiah
Ezr 2:34; Neh 7:36
- Inhabitants of, assist in repairing the walls of Jerusalem
Neh 3:2
- Blind men healed at, by Jesus
Mat 20:34; Mar 10:46; Luk 18:35
- Zacchaeus dwelt at
Luk 19:10
2. Plain of
2Ki 25:5; Jer 52:8
3. Waters of
- General references
Jos 16:1
- Purified by Elisha
2Ki 2:22
